attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT,
(REPAIR_COST_USD_AMT *0.28)  AS ITEM_COST 
FROM $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SSC_PRODUCT_TV
GROUP BY SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT , ITEM_COST

SELECT BK_INVENTORY_SERVICE_ORG_ID,
INVENTORY_PRICE_LIST_NAME 
FROM $$SERVICEVWDB.N_INVENTORY_SERVICE_ORG 
WHERE INVENTORY_PRICE_LIST_NAME LIKE  'CTS%Repair%'

SELECT NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME AS PRICE_LIST_NAME
,SUBSTR(NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,25,3) AS LOC
,NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID AS ITEM
,LOC||ITEM AS LOC_ITEM
,NPP.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS PRICE
,NPL.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE AS CURRENCY_CODE
,NPP.START_TV_DATE
,NPP.END_TV_DATE
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST_TV   NPL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPP 
ON NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = NPP.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME
INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SSC_PRODUCT_TV NP 
ON  NPP.BK_PRODUCT_ID =NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID 
WHERE NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME LIKE 'CTS REPAIR PRICE LIST - %'
AND NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME <> 'CTS REPAIR PRICE LIST - AUD'
AND NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME <> 'CTS REPAIR PRICE LIST - EURO'
AND NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME <> 'CTS REPAIR PRICE LIST - USD'
AND NPP.END_TV_DATE >= CURRENT_DATE

UNION 

SELECT NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME AS PRICE_LIST_NAME
,'U02' AS LOC
,NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID AS ITEM
,LOC||ITEM AS LOC_ITEM
,NPP.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS PRICE
,NPL.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE AS CURRENCY_CODE
,NPP.START_TV_DATE
,NPP.END_TV_DATE
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST_TV NPL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPP 
ON NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = NPP.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME
INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SSC_PRODUCT_TV NP 
ON  NPP.BK_PRODUCT_ID =NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID 
WHERE NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME LIKE 'CTS RPR PRICE LIST-U02 U38 U39 - USD'
AND NPP.END_TV_DATE >= CURRENT_DATE

SELECT NSRO.BK_SERVICE_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM AS REPAIR_ORDER_NUMBER,
NULL AS REPAIR_ORDER_ID,
NSRO.SHIP_FROM_INV_SVC_ORG_ID AS SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,
NSPT.BK_PRODUCT_ID AS ITEM_NAME,
NSRO.DV_REPAIR_ORDER_SHIP_DT AS SHIP_DATE,
MT.TRANSACTION_DTM AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
0 AS REPAIR_QUANTITY,
MT.TRANSACTION_QTY AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
NSRO.REPAIR_ORDER_COST_LOCAL_AMT AS REPAIR_COST,
0 AS STD_COST,
0 AS CONVERSION,
NSPT.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
NULL AS THEATER    
FROM $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SERVICE_REPAIR_ORDER NSRO
INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SSC_PRODUCT_TV NSPT 
ON  NSRO.PRODUCT_KEY = NSPT.ITEM_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIVING_TRX_NEWBUY_H1 NB 
ON NSRO.BK_SERVICE_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM=NB.BK_SERVICE_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM
INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SSC_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION MT
ON MT.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY=NB.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RF 
ON CAST( MT.TRANSACTION_DTM AS DATE ) BETWEEN RF.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RF.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID CTRL
ON RF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = CTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE MT.TRANSACTION_QTY > 0

SELECT 'ITEMRECORD' AS RECORD_TYPE,OTM.THEATER,ITEM_NAME,RPL.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_CODE,GLOBAL_PLANNER,THEATER_PLANNER,
DOCUMENT_REF,TRANSACTION_DATE, SPLC,NULL AS DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY,TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,UOM_CODE,
COST,(VALUE1*MONTHLY_BUDGET_CONV_RT) AS VALUE_USD,(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) AS FISCAL_MONTH_ID,
 CURRENT_DATE AS CREATED_DATE , FISCAL_MONTH_ID
FROM
(SELECT INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,NULL AS TRANSACTION_ID,ITEM_NAME,SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,NULL AS DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_CODE,NULL AS GLOBAL_PLANNER,NULL AS THEATER_PLANNER,
'DOC' AS DOCUMENT_REF,TRANSACTION_DATE,NULL AS SPLC,SUM (TRANSACTION_QUANTITY) AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,NULL AS UOM_CODE,
SUM (REPAIR_COST) AS COST,SUM (COALESCE (REPAIR_COST, 0) * TRANSACTION_QUANTITY) VALUE1
FROM $$STGDB.WI_REPAIR_SHIPMENT_ORDER 
WHERE REPAIR_COST IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,ITEM_NAME,SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,TRANSACTION_DATE

UNION ALL

SELECT RSO.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,RSO.TRANSACTION_ID,RSO.ITEM_NAME,RSO.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSO.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSO.GLOBAL_PLANNER,RSO.THEATER_PLANNER,
RSO.DOCUMENT_REF,RSO.TRANSACTION_DATE,RSO.SPLC,SUM(RSO.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY),RSO.UOM_CODE,SUM(RPL.PRICE) AS COST,SUM(COALESCE(RPL.PRICE,0.00) * RSO.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY) AS VALUE1
FROM 
(SELECT INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,NULL AS TRANSACTION_ID,ITEM_NAME,SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,NULL AS DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_CODE,NULL AS GLOBAL_PLANNER,NULL AS THEATER_PLANNER,
'DOC' AS DOCUMENT_REF,TRANSACTION_DATE,NULL AS SPLC,SUM (TRANSACTION_QUANTITY) AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,NULL AS UOM_CODE,
SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE||ITEM_NAME AS ORG_ITEM, SUM (REPAIR_COST) AS COST
FROM $$STGDB.WI_REPAIR_SHIPMENT_ORDER 
GROUP BY INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,ITEM_NAME,SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,TRANSACTION_DATE,SHIP_DATE HAVING COST IS NULL ) RSO
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REPAIR_PRICE_LIST RPL
ON RSO.ORG_ITEM = RPL.LOC_ITEM
WHERE RPL.PRICE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,RSO.ITEM_NAME,SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,TRANSACTION_DATE

UNION ALL

SELECT RSPL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,RSPL.TRANSACTION_ID,RSPL.ITEM_NAME,RSPL.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSPL.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSPL.GLOBAL_PLANNER,RSPL.THEATER_PLANNER,
RSPL.DOCUMENT_REF,RSPL.TRANSACTION_DATE,RSPL.SPLC,RSPL.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,RSPL.UOM_CODE,SUM(ROPL.PRICE) AS COST, SUM(COALESCE(ROPL.PRICE * RSPL.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,0)) AS VALUE1
FROM

(SELECT RSO.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,RSO.TRANSACTION_ID,RSO.ITEM_NAME,RSO.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSO.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSO.GLOBAL_PLANNER,RSO.THEATER_PLANNER,
RSO.DOCUMENT_REF,RSO.TRANSACTION_DATE,RSO.SPLC,RSO.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,RSO.UOM_CODE,RPL.PRICE,RSO.COST
FROM 
(SELECT INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,NULL AS TRANSACTION_ID,ITEM_NAME,SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,NULL AS DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_CODE,NULL AS GLOBAL_PLANNER,NULL AS THEATER_PLANNER,
'DOC' AS DOCUMENT_REF,TRANSACTION_DATE,NULL AS SPLC,SUM (TRANSACTION_QUANTITY) AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,NULL AS UOM_CODE,
SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE||ITEM_NAME AS ORG_ITEM, SUM (REPAIR_COST) AS COST
FROM $$STGDB.WI_REPAIR_SHIPMENT_ORDER 
GROUP BY INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,ITEM_NAME,SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,TRANSACTION_DATE HAVING COST IS NULL ) RSO
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REPAIR_PRICE_LIST RPL
ON RSO.ORG_ITEM = RPL.LOC_ITEM
WHERE RPL.PRICE IS NULL) RSPL

LEFT OUTER JOIN (
SELECT A.ORGANIZATION_CODE,A.REPAIR_PRICE_LIST, B.PRICE,B.ITEM_NAME 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_REPAIR_ORG_PRICE_LIST A
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REPAIR_PRICE_LIST B
ON B.PRICE_LIST_NAME=A.REPAIR_PRICE_LIST
GROUP BY A.ORGANIZATION_CODE,A.REPAIR_PRICE_LIST, B.PRICE,B.ITEM_NAME) ROPL
ON ROPL.ORGANIZATION_CODE = RSPL.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE AND ROPL.ITEM_NAME = RSPL.ITEM_NAME
WHERE ROPL.PRICE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY RSPL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,RSPL.TRANSACTION_ID,RSPL.ITEM_NAME,RSPL.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSPL.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSPL.GLOBAL_PLANNER,RSPL.THEATER_PLANNER,
RSPL.DOCUMENT_REF,RSPL.TRANSACTION_DATE,RSPL.SPLC,RSPL.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,RSPL.UOM_CODE

UNION ALL

SELECT RSOPL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,RSOPL.TRANSACTION_ID,RSOPL.ITEM_NAME,RSOPL.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSOPL.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSOPL.GLOBAL_PLANNER,RSOPL.THEATER_PLANNER,
RSOPL.DOCUMENT_REF,RSOPL.TRANSACTION_DATE,RSOPL.SPLC,RSOPL.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,RSOPL.UOM_CODE, SUM(CST.ITEM_COST) AS COST,
SUM (CST.ITEM_COST * RSOPL.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY) AS VALUE1
FROM

(SELECT RSPL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,RSPL.TRANSACTION_ID,RSPL.ITEM_NAME,RSPL.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSPL.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSPL.GLOBAL_PLANNER,RSPL.THEATER_PLANNER,
RSPL.DOCUMENT_REF,RSPL.TRANSACTION_DATE,RSPL.SPLC,RSPL.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,RSPL.UOM_CODE,ROPL.PRICE
FROM

(SELECT RSO.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,RSO.TRANSACTION_ID,RSO.ITEM_NAME,RSO.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSO.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSO.GLOBAL_PLANNER,RSO.THEATER_PLANNER,
RSO.DOCUMENT_REF,RSO.TRANSACTION_DATE,RSO.SPLC,RSO.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,RSO.UOM_CODE,RPL.PRICE,RSO.COST
FROM 
(SELECT INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,NULL AS TRANSACTION_ID,ITEM_NAME,SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,NULL AS DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_CODE,NULL AS GLOBAL_PLANNER,NULL AS THEATER_PLANNER,
'DOC' AS DOCUMENT_REF,TRANSACTION_DATE,NULL AS SPLC,SUM (TRANSACTION_QUANTITY) AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,NULL AS UOM_CODE,
SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE||ITEM_NAME AS ORG_ITEM, SUM (REPAIR_COST) AS COST
FROM $$STGDB.WI_REPAIR_SHIPMENT_ORDER 
GROUP BY INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,ITEM_NAME,SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,TRANSACTION_DATE HAVING COST IS NULL ) RSO
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REPAIR_PRICE_LIST RPL
ON RSO.ORG_ITEM = RPL.LOC_ITEM
WHERE RPL.PRICE IS NULL) RSPL

LEFT OUTER JOIN (
SELECT A.ORGANIZATION_CODE,A.REPAIR_PRICE_LIST, B.PRICE,B.ITEM_NAME                      
FROM $$STGDB.WI_REPAIR_ORG_PRICE_LIST A
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REPAIR_PRICE_LIST B
ON B.PRICE_LIST_NAME=A.REPAIR_PRICE_LIST
GROUP BY A.ORGANIZATION_CODE,A.REPAIR_PRICE_LIST, B.PRICE,B.ITEM_NAME) ROPL
ON ROPL.ORGANIZATION_CODE = RSPL.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE AND ROPL.ITEM_NAME = RSPL.ITEM_NAME
WHERE ROPL.PRICE IS NULL) RSOPL

INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CST_ITEM_COSTS CST
ON CST.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = RSOPL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
GROUP BY RSOPL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,RSOPL.TRANSACTION_ID,RSOPL.ITEM_NAME,RSOPL.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSOPL.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_CODE,RSOPL.GLOBAL_PLANNER,RSOPL.THEATER_PLANNER,
RSOPL.DOCUMENT_REF,RSOPL.TRANSACTION_DATE,RSOPL.SPLC,RSOPL.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,RSOPL.UOM_CODE) RPL

INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,THEATER FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_ORG_THEATER_MAPPING) OTM
ON OTM.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE = RPL.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE


INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE,CURRENCY FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_ORG_CURRENCY_MAPPING) OCM
ON OCM.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE = RPL.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_CODE

INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT MONTHLY_BUDGET_CONV_RT,BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CD
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_MONTHLY_CONVERSION_RATE 
WHERE MONTHLY_BUDGET_CONV_RT IS NOT NULL
AND FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT IN (SELECT (CASE WHEN FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE + 6 > CURRENT_DATE 
THEN FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER 
ELSE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT END) 
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y')) ECCM
ON ECCM.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CD = OCM.CURRENCY
